targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  source_file AS source,
  COUNT(*)::bigint AS rows,
  MAX(imported_at) AS last_import
FROM water_sampling_schedule
GROUP BY source_file
ORDER BY source_file

SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN LOWER(source_file) LIKE '%standby%' THEN 'standby'
    WHEN LOWER(source_file) LIKE '%active%' THEN 'active'
    ELSE 'unclassified'
  END AS well,
  analyte_name,
  next_due_date,
  next_due_raw,
  notes,
  ps_code,
  source_file,
  imported_at
FROM water_sampling_schedule
WHERE group_name = 'LEAD_COPPER'
ORDER BY well, analyte_name

SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN LOWER(source_file) LIKE '%standby%' THEN 'standby'
    WHEN LOWER(source_file) LIKE '%active%' THEN 'active'
    ELSE 'unclassified'
  END AS well,
  source_file,
  ps_code,
  group_name,
  analyte_name,
  next_due_date,
  next_due_raw,
  last_sampled,
  notes
FROM water_sampling_schedule
WHERE next_due_date IS NOT NULL
  AND next_due_date <= (CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '120 days')::date
ORDER BY well, next_due_date ASC, source_file, ps_code, analyte_name

SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN LOWER(source_file) LIKE '%standby%' THEN 'standby'
    WHEN LOWER(source_file) LIKE '%active%' THEN 'active'
    ELSE 'unclassified'
  END AS well,
  source_file,
  ps_code,
  group_name,
  analyte_name,
  next_due_date,
  next_due_raw,
  last_sampled,
  notes,
  imported_at
FROM water_sampling_schedule
ORDER BY well, source_file, ps_code, group_name, analyte_name

panels.title: Flagged in Notes (Due now / Past due)
panels.description: Rows where Notes suggests immediate attention; validate against DWW.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN LOWER(source_file) LIKE '%standby%' THEN 'standby'
    WHEN LOWER(source_file) LIKE '%active%' THEN 'active'
    ELSE 'unclassified'
  END AS well,
  source_file,
  ps_code,
  analyte_name,
  notes,
  next_due_date,
  next_due_raw
FROM water_sampling_schedule
WHERE notes IS NOT NULL
  AND (
    UPPER(notes) LIKE '%DUE NOW%'
    OR UPPER(notes) LIKE '%PAST DUE%'
  )
ORDER BY well, source_file, ps_code, analyte_name
